---
title: Visages et expressions
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557538/visages_20230115_arzght.png
description: Visages et expressions, Line of action website
categories: ["generalillustration"]
date: 2023-01-15
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557538/visages_20230115_arzght.png)

{{< meta description >}}
:::
